name: Bergbahnen Hohsaas
description: Located above the village of Saas-Grund in the Valais Alps, Bergbahnen Hohsaas is comprised of 3 peaks, and provides access to one of Switzerland’s most impressive high-altitude viewpoints. Known for its sunny plateaus and unparalleled views of the "Big Four-Thousanders," it is a premier destination for both winter sports and summer hiking. Whether you want to test your limits or are simply looking for relaxation and fun, you have come to the right place with us.
